name: cen3_chrIII
description: Centromere 3 (cen3) on S. pombe chromosome III. ~110 kb, the largest centromere in the genome. cnt3 central core (~13 kb, unique sequence loading CENP-A^Cnp1) flanked by imr3L/R innermost repeats and otr3L/R outer dg/dh cassettes; cen3 has the highest dg/dh copy number of the three centromeres.
expected_copy_count: 1 monocentric centromere per chromosome; dg/dh otr cassettes 2-10 copies per side
